name: CMake HPC Build Preflight
summary: Plan reproducible CMake configure, build, test, and install steps on HPC systems.
description: This skill helps users and support teams capture compiler, MPI, module, prefix, and build-directory assumptions before building CMake-based scientific software on shared HPC systems, with optional guarded configure, build, ctest, and install phases.

tools.name: cmake
tools.notes: Used to inspect CMake version and optionally run configure, build, test, and install phases.

tools.name: ninja
tools.notes: Optional build backend when the Ninja generator is selected.

tools.name: make
tools.notes: Optional build backend when Makefiles are selected.

tools.name: mpicc
tools.notes: MPI C wrapper evidence when building MPI-enabled codes.

tools.name: mpicxx
tools.notes: MPI C++ wrapper evidence when building MPI-enabled codes.

tools.name: mpifort
tools.notes: MPI Fortran wrapper evidence when building Fortran or mixed-language codes.

inputs.name: source_dir
inputs.description: CMake project source directory containing CMakeLists.txt.

inputs.name: build_dir
inputs.description: Out-of-source build directory, preferably on scratch or a project filesystem appropriate for build artifacts.

inputs.name: install_prefix
inputs.description: User-owned install prefix that will not overwrite system or shared software paths.

inputs.name: generator
inputs.description: CMake generator such as Ninja or Unix Makefiles.

inputs.name: cmake_cache_options
inputs.description: Reviewed -D cache options such as MPI, HDF5, CUDA, ROCm, BLAS, or install layout settings.

outputs.name: build_preflight_report
outputs.description: Environment, module, compiler, MPI wrapper, CMake, generator, and prefix evidence.

outputs.name: reviewable_build_plan
outputs.description: Exact configure, build, ctest, and install commands with guarded execution controls.

outputs.name: cmake_presets_example
outputs.description: Portable CMakePresets example for user-owned HPC build directories and install prefixes.

examples.title: Prepare or run a guarded CMake build workflow
Example CMake presets for HPC builds
Review local build policy before compiling or installing

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Check shell syntax without running CMake.
Check that the presets example is valid JSON.
Run the script in plan-only mode against a small CMake project, then enable configure/build/test/install phases one at a time in a suitable allocation or build node.
